positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical illustration of a mystical forest scene, optimized for apparel printing. The composition features abstract, glowing flora and silhouettes of stylized woodland animals (such as foxes and owls). The style must be high-contrast vector art with crisp, clean lines, resembling woodblock print or mid-century modern graphic design. The color palette should be limited and striking: deep midnight blue background, vibrant electric teal, neon yellow, and matte black. Focus on strong, visible silhouettes and geometric arrangements. Centered composition, detailed line art, perfect symmetry, commercial illustration quality.
negative: blur, noise, grain, watermark, text, signature, low resolution, fuzzy, poor anatomy, bad hands, extra limbs, messy lines, realistic photography, grayscale
